title: Ultra VIP
desc_1: Reserved for the world's most discerning travelers.
desc_2: A realm of absolute privacy, bespoke luxury, and peerless security.

choose.title: Our Ultra VIP Journeys
choose.desc: Two distinct pathways, one standard of absolute excellence. Select the journey that resonates with your vision.

gold.desc: A perfectly orchestrated sequence of luxury, privacy, and speed. From the moment you touch down to your final departure, every transition is seamless.

itinerary.title: Jet-Side Arrival: Elite
itinerary.description: Direct jet-side greeting with private concierge and traditional welcome ceremony. Skip the terminal entirely as your security team escorts you.

itinerary.title: Armored Command Transit
itinerary.description: 24/7 Close Protection Detail (CPD) with armored SUV escort for all ground movements between flight segments.

itinerary.title: Total Aerial Domain
itinerary.description: A dedicated helicopter and crew remain on standby for the duration of your trip, ensuring travel at the speed of thought.

itinerary.title: Sovereign Sanctuary
itinerary.description: Total buyout of a private island or estate. 1:1 staff-to-guest ratio including private physician, chef, and master butler.

itinerary.title: Exclusive Masterclasses
itinerary.description: Private sessions with world-renowned gemologists, spiritual masters, and culinary legends in absolute seclusion.

itinerary.title: Zero-Trace Departure
itinerary.description: Direct-to-aircraft tarmac departure. Every protocol designed to ensure your transition is unseen and unmatched.

signature.desc: Seven days. Seven extraordinary chapters. One island, experienced in its entirety at the highest level.

itinerary.title: VIP Arrival in Colombo
itinerary.experience: Your journey begins the moment your aircraft lands.
itinerary.stay: Ultra-luxury city hotel or private suite
itinerary.note: Recover from travel and feel immediately cared for.

itinerary.title: Helicopter to the Ancient Kingdom
itinerary.experience: An aerial journey over jungles and ancient reservoirs to the kingdom of Sigiriya.
highlights: Aerial view of jungles and reservoirs
Private guided visit with archaeology expert
itinerary.stay: Luxury jungle resort or private villa

itinerary.title: Wild Sri Lanka Safari
itinerary.experience: A private safari experience in one of Asia's most pristine national parks.
highlights: Possible sightings: Leopards, Elephants, Sloth bears
optional: Private bush dinner in the jungle

itinerary.title: Into the Tea Mountains
itinerary.experience: A serene ascent into the misty highlands, where tea reigns supreme.
highlights: Scenic helicopter or luxury train experience
optional: Fireplace dinner with fine wine pairing
itinerary.note: A completely different landscape — cool, lush, and timeless.

itinerary.title: Scenic Highlands & Culture
itinerary.experience: The highlands in all their glory, before transitioning toward the coast.
highlights: Visit the iconic Nine Arches Bridge
Helicopter transfer to the south coast
itinerary.note: Where the trip transitions from adventure to relaxation.

itinerary.title: Luxury Beach Escape
itinerary.experience: Slow luxury on the southern coast — the art of doing nothing, perfectly.
highlights: Private candlelight dinner on the beach
itinerary.note: This day is about slow luxury.

itinerary.title: Ocean & Departure
itinerary.experience: A final morning on the water before your sovereign departure.

philosophy.title: Privacy Architecture
philosophy.desc: Our Ultra VIP tier is a fortified private domain. Beyond luxury, we provide a "Zero-Trace" security architecture designed for high-profile individuals requiring absolute seclusion.

grid.title: Sovereign NDA Protocols
grid.desc: All staff and partners operate under multi-jurisdictional, elite-tier non-disclosure agreements.

grid.title: Invisible Transitions
grid.desc: Jet-side tarmac handling and private helipads to ensure zero public or digital exposure.

grid.title: Hardened Communications
grid.desc: Military-grade encrypted concierge channels for all planning and on-ground adjustments.

grid.title: Ghost-Protocol Billing
grid.desc: Total financial invisibility and comprehensive global identity protection.

seclusion.title: Absolute Seclusion
seclusion.desc: Extreme privacy protocols with 100% staff anonymity and total site buyouts.

access.title: Impossible Access
access.desc: We open doors to private collections, remote sites, and sacred spaces.

items: Dedicated English Speaking National Guide & Expert Driver
Personalized Gourmet Kitchen (6-Member Elite Chef Team)
Brand New Bespoke Linen (Destroyed/Gifted After Stay)
Dedicated Standby Helicopter for Trip Duration
After-hours Private Opening of National Sites
